citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
Housekeeping for Premises. The walls and the floor of the bird housing room were noted to be dirty and in need of
cleaning. There was an excessive amount of dried excreta located on the walls and on the floor next to the enclosures
that housed the larger species of birds, and there was an excessive amount of particulate debris present on the floor of
the room.
Per this Section, premises where housing facilities are located, including the building where the birds are housed, must be
kept clean to protect the birds from disease and to facilitate the husbandry practices required in this subpart. The walls
and the floor of the bird housing room need to be cleaned to maintain the housekeeping of the premises and for the health
of the birds. Correct by 3/27/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with Licensee.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
3.158(c) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
Housekeeping for Premises. The walls and the floor of the bird housing room were noted to be dirty and in need of 
cleaning. There was an excessive amount of dried excreta located on the walls and on the floor next to the enclosures 
that housed the larger species of birds, and there was an excessive amount of particulate debris present on the floor of 
the room. 
 
Per this Section, premises where housing facilities are located, including the building where the birds are housed, must be 
kept clean to protect the birds from disease and to facilitate the husbandry practices required in this subpart. The walls 
and the floor of the bird housing room need to be cleaned to maintain the housekeeping of the premises and for the health 
of the birds. Correct by 3/27/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with Licensee.  
 
*END OF REPORT*
